es.caption: Diseño del Panel Principal
es.description: Vista detallada de la interfaz unificada del Super SIX.

en.caption: Main Panel Layout
en.description: Detailed view of the unified interface of the Super SIX.

es.caption: Sección del Filtro Conmutable
es.description: Controles para alternar entre el filtro IR3109 y el 80017A.

en.caption: Selectable Filter Section
en.description: Controls to switch between the IR3109 and 80017A filters.

es.caption: Ruteo Modular Interno
es.description: Pantalla dedicada para cambiar los modelos de DCO, VCF, HPF y ADSR.

en.caption: Internal Modular Routing
en.description: Dedicated screen to swap DCO, VCF, HPF, and ADSR models.

es.caption: Módulo RE-201 Space Delay
es.description: El nuevo efecto de retardo de cinta integrado para texturas espaciales.

en.caption: RE-201 Space Delay Module
en.description: The new integrated tape delay effect for spacey textures.

es.caption: Controles del Chorus BBD
es.description: Ajustes de desgaste (Wear) y siseo de fondo del Chorus.

en.caption: BBD Chorus Controls
en.description: Adjustments for Chorus wear and background analog hiss.

es.caption: Panel de Circuit Bending
es.description: Ajuste fino de componentes, voltajes e inestabilidades analógicas.

en.caption: Circuit Bending Panel
en.description: Fine-tuning of components, voltages, and analogue instabilities.

es.caption: Arpegiador & Sincronización
es.description: Controles de ritmo, modos de octava y sincronización al tempo.

en.caption: Arpeggiator & Sync
en.description: Controls for rate, octave modes, and tempo synchronization.

es.caption: Teclado Virtual Interactivo
es.description: Teclado integrado para preescuchar parches directamente desde el navegador.

en.caption: Interactive Virtual Keyboard
en.description: Integrated keyboard to audition patches directly from the browser.

es.caption: Gestión de Presets
es.description: Navegador de presets y banco de 128 parches históricos de la serie.

en.caption: Preset Management
en.description: Preset browser and bank containing 128 historical patches.

es.caption: Calibración de Frecuencia
es.description: Opciones avanzadas para ajustar la deriva térmica del oscilador.

en.caption: Frequency Calibration
en.description: Advanced options to adjust oscillator thermal drift.
